title: Section Crosslists
description: Lists of sections of different courses that meet together, cover the same course material, and have an instructor or set of instructors.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the Section Crosslists.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the list of cross-listed sections.

section.title: Section
section.description: A section that is cross-listed with other sections.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Section.

type.title: Type
type.description: A indication of the type (primary, secondary) of the section within the group of cross-listed sections.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.description: An indicator specifying if all students are placed on the wait-list when any of the cross-listed sections has reached its maximum enrollment or only when the combined registration has reached the specified maximum enrollment of the cross-list.

maxEnrollment.title: Maximum Enrollment
maxEnrollment.description: The maximum enrollment of the cross-listed section over all included sections.

maxWaitlist.title: Maximum Waitlist
maxWaitlist.description: The maximum number of students allowed in the combined wait-list for the cross-listed section.
